content.speakerText: So to confirm: you'll revise the literature review, add 8 new citations, and submit the draft by next Friday?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下：你要修改文献综述、加8个新引用，下周五交初稿，对吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, got it. I'll make sure to hit all those points.
That's right—I'll revise the literature review, add eight citations, and submit the draft by Friday.
Confirmed. I'll also attach a changes log for transparency.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应确认请求，未误解或回避任务
语言准确性：语法正确，动词和时态使用恰当
表达自然度：使用口语化但专业的表达，如 'got it', 'hit all those points', 'for transparency'
关键词覆盖：包含 'revise', 'citations', 'submit', 'draft', 'Friday' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Just to confirm—you'll finalize the budget report, include the expense breakdown, and email it to finance by Tuesday?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下：你会完成预算报告，包含支出明细，并在周二前发给财务部门，对吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, I'll finalize the budget report with the expense breakdown and send it to finance by Tuesday.
Got it. I'll make sure the breakdown is clear and email it before the deadline.
Confirmed. I'll double-check the numbers and CC the manager for visibility.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰确认所有任务项，无遗漏或歧义
语言准确性：正确使用 'finalize', 'include', 'email', 'by [time]' 等结构
表达自然度：使用职场常用表达如 'got it', 'double-check', 'for visibility'
关键词覆盖：包含 'budget report', 'expense breakdown', 'email', 'finance', 'Tuesday'

content.speakerText: So we’re agreed—you’ll handle the client presentation, update the case studies, and present it on Thursday?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以我们达成一致了：你来负责客户演示，更新案例研究，并在周四进行展示，对吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, that’s correct—I’ll update the case studies and prepare the slides for Thursday.
Confirmed. I’ll make sure the case studies are current and the deck is polished.
Right. I’ll send you a draft by Tuesday so you can review before Thursday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整确认三项任务，无遗漏
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词如 'update', 'prepare', 'send', 'review'
表达自然度：使用职场口语表达如 'that’s correct', 'polished', 'draft for review'
关键词覆盖：包含 'client presentation', 'case studies', 'present', 'Thursday', 'draft'
